home.metaTitle: SANTÉ — The sanctuary for your clinical flow
home.metaDescription: Modern clinic management for solo practitioners, multi-practitioner clinics, and a beautifully secure client portal. Bilingual EN / FR.

hero.subtitle: Everything you need to manage a modern practice, designed with the warmth of a well-organized office.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.body: Automated booking that respects your boundaries. Seamless calendar sync for solo or multi-practitioner clinics.

notes.title: SOAP & Clinical Notes
notes.body: Healthcare-grade charting that feels like writing in a journal. Secure, encrypted, and effortlessly organized.

billing.title: Integrated Billing
billing.body: Payment processing and insurance claims built directly into the flow. Get paid faster without the friction.

scale.title: From solo practice to multi-location clinic.
scale.body: Whether you're just starting out or managing fifty practitioners, our platform adapts to your scale without losing the human touch.

features.metaDescription: Scheduling, clinical notes, billing, telehealth, and a beautiful client portal — built for modern practices.
features.title: Tools for every part of your practice.
features.subtitle: From the first booking to the final receipt — every interaction handled with care.

scheduling.title: Scheduling & Calendar
items: Central calendar with colour, status & notes

clinical.title: Clinical Records
items: Structured SOAP, follow-up, couple & family notes
Unlimited note templates with expert library
AI Scribe — automated note capture (English, paid add-on)

client.title: Client Experience
items: Easy access to exercises and documents

pricing.metaDescription: Simple, predictable pricing for solo practitioners and multi-practitioner clinics.
pricing.title: Simple pricing. Beautifully fair.
pricing.subtitle: One platform, predictable per-practitioner billing. Try free for 30 days.

about.metaDescription: We're building the calmest, warmest clinic platform — bilingual and Canadian.
about.title: Built with care, for those who care.
about.body: SANTÉ is a modern clinic management platform built for practitioners across Canada. Bilingual from day one, designed to feel less like software and more like a well-organized office.

trust.title: Trust
trust.body: Healthcare-grade security with PIPEDA-compliant Canadian data residency.

warmth.title: Warmth
warmth.body: Software that feels human — not corporate, not cold.

scale.title: Scale
scale.body: From solo therapists to fifty-practitioner clinics, without losing the touch.

contact.metaDescription: Talk to our team about SANTÉ for your practice or clinic.
contact.title: Let's talk about your practice.
contact.subtitle: Tell us a bit about your needs and we'll be in touch within one business day.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Thanks — we'll be in touch soon.

footer.tagline: Modern management for the mindful practitioner. Secure, intuitive, and human-centric.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Clinic branding, language, profile, and AI tools.
settings.languageHelp: Choose the interface language. The change applies instantly across the app.
settings.profileHelp: Your photo appears in the header on every page.
settings.aiScribeBody: Paste raw session notes or a dictated transcript and get a clean SOAP note in seconds.
settings.imageOnly: Please pick an image file under 4 MB.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Revenue, appointments, and clinic performance trends.
reports.sampleBody: Book real appointments and record payments to see live reports here.
